description: Gray outlines act as containers. Colored patches are moved or copied into the matching container interiors and removed from their original stray locations. Confidence is medium because matching patch to container is shape-dependent.
arcDslCode:
from dsl import *
from constants import *


def solve_228f6490(I):
    x1 = objects(I, T, F, F)
    x2 = colorfilter(x1, ZERO)
    x3 = rbind(bordering, I)
    x4 = compose(flip, x3)
    x5 = sfilter(x2, x4)
    x6 = first(x5)
    x7 = last(x5)
    x8 = difference(x1, x2)
    x9 = compose(normalize, toindices)
    x10 = x9(x6)
    x11 = x9(x7)
    x12 = matcher(x9, x10)
    x13 = matcher(x9, x11)
    x14 = extract(x8, x12)
    x15 = extract(x8, x13)
    x16 = ulcorner(x6)
    x17 = ulcorner(x7)
    x18 = ulcorner(x14)
    x19 = ulcorner(x15)
    x20 = subtract(x16, x18)
    x21 = subtract(x17, x19)
    x22 = move(I, x14, x20)
    O = move(x22, x15, x21)
    return O
